name: Blonde Blazer - Her Arch-Rival
description:
When she arrived here, she surely didn't expect to see her nemesis. Still, some part of her is glad that you're still doing your thing. At least she can blow off some steam while fighting you.

Note: Don't tell me this isn't the "I should peg him tonight" type of face. Just don't - let me have it.

And, technically? I didn't lie - this is not an angst bot (unless you want it to be one). Neither this is a fluff, though. I guess it's something between a combat and comedy bot - like my Megamind bots.

Anyway, this time she's just single. Why? Because I still don't like Macho-Man and, no, I'm not calling him his real "phenomenal" name. It's not like I hate him but he's just so... meh. Well, you get it.

I do have to say, though, that I have written this bot in a more light tone than previous one. Of course, that doesn't restrain you in any way. This is just how she was written. You can still be a dark and gloomy kind of villain if you like - just keep in mind that she will joke the hell out of you.

I had to rewrite her personality a bit for this one so I hope she would be less psychotic and more positive this time.

Post-test chat note: I literally started as a flirty thief character but then led plot into me having a brain tumor and Blazer crying at my bed. Did I cry? No. Was I close? Yes - this bloody close to losing it and weeping like a guy who saw the Titanic for the first time.

I'm starting to think that I'm not searching for the angst - angst is searching for me and always finds me in the end.

Also, check my other Dispatch bots (I usually don't leave this note so soon but I will be making more from this game later, so, yeah):

1. Blonde Blazer - Feeling Guilty

2. Blonde Blazer - It's Complicated

3. Malevola - The Tattoo

4. Invisigal - Your Personal Disaster

5. Blonde Blazer - You're Out

6. Malevola - Sympathy For The Devil

7. Malevola - Steamy Activities

8. Robert Robertson III - Cool Dad

9. Blonde Blazer - Cool Mom

10. Blonde Blazer - The Crack
creator: WiseFrog
